items.name: eval_script
items.doc: Evaluate a Rhai script string and return a `ViewConfig`.

items.name: eval_file
items.doc: Load and evaluate a single `.rhai` file (delegated to gateway).

items.name: load_all
items.signature: pub fn load_all(dir: &Path) -> Result<HashMap<String, ViewConfig>, ViewConfigError>
items.doc: Scan `dir/*.rhai` and return a map of `{stem → ViewConfig}` (delegated to gateway).
